name: duraludon
flavor_texts: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.
The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.
text: Duraludon is the Alloy Pokémon. It is a steel and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: light-metal, heavy-metal, stalwart (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 95, Defense: 115, Sp. Atk: 120, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 85. Evolution line: duraludon → archaludon. Lore: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily. The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain.
